Design Portfolio & Product Case Studies

Bigul.co Trading Experience

Redesigning the complex retail trading workflow, KYC compliance, and portfolio tracking dashboards.

Role: Lead Designer Team: 8 Members Timeline: Nov 24 - Present
Key Business Impact: +22% KYC onboarding completion, +28% task success rate, and -25% support ticket volume.

Key Business Impact: +18-25% checkout speed improvements, +12-18% conversion rate, and -15% cart drop-offs.
